summary: Replayed ADR 0283 from exact-main release 0.177.99 using committed source f8bd6088817ecd676f9c59f17f52e9cf0dd20b56 after confirming origin/main still remained at f5ca9ae417fc597be284e974b7186aa2ad4bcb68, re-verified the current Proxmox host baseline, the Plausible runtime on docker-runtime-lv3, the public analytics edge publication path, and a fresh public pageview that reached ClickHouse on poll attempt 2. This exact-main replay justifies the platform-version bump from 0.130.65 to 0.130.66.

verification.observed: The exact-main compatibility slice reran from committed source `f8bd6088817ecd676f9c59f17f52e9cf0dd20b56`; `uv run --with pytest pytest tests/test_plausible_playbook.py tests/test_edge_publication_makefile.py tests/test_plausible_runtime_role.py` passed with `13 passed`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-targeted-checks-r1-0.177.99.txt`.

`make converge-plausible` succeeded from committed source `f8bd6088817ecd676f9c59f17f52e9cf0dd20b56` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=145 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=21 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `localhost : ok=18 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=3 rescued=0 ignored=0`, and `nginx-lv3 : ok=39 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-live-apply-0.177.99.txt`.

A fresh host-state probe confirmed the server still reports hostname `debian-base-template`, `pve-manager/9.1.6/71482d1833ded40a (running kernel: 6.17.13-2-pve)`, and running VMs `110` plus `120`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-host-state-r1-0.177.99.txt`.

A fresh runtime probe on `docker-runtime-lv3` confirmed the `plausible`, `plausible-db`, `plausible-events-db`, and `plausible-openbao-agent` containers remained up, the local ready endpoint still returned `{"sessions":"ok","postgres":"ok","clickhouse":"ok","sites_cache":"ok"}`, and listeners remained present on `10.10.10.20:8016` and `127.0.0.1:8016`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-post-state-r1-0.177.99.txt`.

A fresh public probe reconfirmed `https://analytics.example.com/api/system/health/ready`, the `https://analytics.example.com/js/script.js` tracker injection on `nginx.example.com`, the dashboard OIDC redirect with `x-robots-tag: noindex, nofollow`, and public DNS `analytics.example.com -> 203.0.113.1`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-public-verify-r1-0.177.99.txt`.

A fresh public pageview smoke posted `202 Accepted` to `https://analytics.example.com/api/event` and confirmed the synthetic path `/plausible-e2e-1774863976` reached ClickHouse on poll attempt `2`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-public-event-e2e-r1-0.177.99.txt`.

This receipt supersedes `2026-03-30-adr-0283-plausible-analytics-live-apply` as the canonical Plausible receipt because the successful replay now comes from the synchronized exact-main source instead of the workstream branch.

`git diff --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, and `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check` all passed on the final integrated `0.177.99` tree, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-git-diff-check-r3-0.177.99.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-live-apply-receipts-validate-r3-0.177.99.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-validate-data-models-r3-0.177.99.txt`, `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-canonical-truth-check-r3-0.177.99.txt`, and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-platform-manifest-check-r3-0.177.99.txt`.

The first `make remote-validate` run correctly flagged a stale dependency graph artifact and pointed at `python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --write`; after regenerating that artifact, the rerun passed with `agent-standards`, `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-syntax`, `dependency-graph`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, `type-check`, and `workstream-surfaces` all reported as `passed`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-remote-validate-r1-0.177.99.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-remote-validate-r2-0.177.99.txt`.

`make pre-push-gate` passed with `agent-standards`, `documentation-index`, `yaml-lint`, `schema-validation`, `policy-validation`, `alert-rule-validation`, `dependency-direction`, `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `dependency-graph`, `artifact-secret-scan`, `ansible-syntax`, `ansible-lint`, `type-check`, `service-completeness`, `packer-validate`, `tofu-validate`, `security-scan`, `integration-tests`, and `workstream-surfaces` all reported as `passed`, captured in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0283-mainline-pre-push-gate-r2-0.177.99.txt`.

notes: This receipt is the canonical exact-main proof for ADR 0283 on top of repository release 0.177.99 and live platform version 0.130.66.

The first synchronized branch-local replay needed one provider-side bridge because the Hetzner DNS automation did not create the `analytics` A record; the record was created manually through the provider API and the later governed replays then observed the canonical provider state.
The earlier branch-local receipt remains part of the audit trail, but the canonical Plausible receipt for integrated main now points at this exact-main replay.
